name: RPlog_talk_Skirmish_at_Larni
title: Talk Page: Disputing a Retcon at Larni
summary: This is an out-of-character wiki talk page in which the player Zhukov disputes his own Skirmish at Larni log, asking the faction heads of both major sides to clarify what was and was not retconned after hearing that elements of the scene (notably Vextin's surrender and Wolf's fate) had been altered. Editors and staff respond at length: Hawke seeks clarification, the Imperial faction head and Rall both insist nothing was actually retconned and that Wolf's player chose capture against the scene's IC logic, and SW1 Kyle reflects on the pitfalls of capture plots and the need for better OOC communication between factions. The entire discussion is editorial and meta, concerning game mechanics and continuity rather than any in-character roleplay.
